title: Israeli strikes kill 11 people in Gaza City, medics say
summary_full: Women and children were among those killed in the attacks on four residential buildings, which Israel's military says killed four Hamas security officials.
summary_public: Women and children were among those killed in the attacks on four residential buildings, which Israel's military says killed four Hamas security officials.
